name: RABBIT-BUG-4
title: Test isolation: rabbit-backlog and rabbit-bug tests commit into live repo when git-commit is enabled
description: After git-commit was added to file-backlog-item.sh, backlog-item-status.sh, file-bug.sh, and bug-status.sh, tests that invoke these scripts inside the live repo directory (without RABBIT_ROOT pointing to a temp isolated git repo) produce real commits in the branch history. Tests for git-commit behavior (t_new12, t_bug7, t_bug8) must use a temp git repo with RABBIT_ROOT override, similar to the tdd-step.sh tests. Existing test-backlog-scripts.sh and test-bug-scripts.sh also need isolation auditing.
